rules_applied: thirstyAssRegisterSplit: Retire 'Dorstlap' entirely (off-theme: thirsty ≠ drunk). Establish formal 'Beschonken Ezel' (canon, unchanged) vs casual 'Zatlap' (Flemish -lap epithet, drunk-rag/sot register). Codex update required post-pass: replace Dorstlap with Zatlap as casual form, keep Beschonken Ezel as formal canon. Per-line disposition: formal contexts (stage directions, third-person mention, profile/credits) → Beschonken Ezel; peer-to-peer direct address → Zatlap. Bare 'Beschonken' is unstable: → Beschonken Ezel for narrated third-person, → Zatlap for direct casual address.
dorstklapTypoFix: 'Dorstklap' (E3_Mine1FOpening J67) is a typo. Resolved to 'Beschonken Ezel' per stage-direction context.
decision_status: Q9 fully locked. 12 corrections (6 → Beschonken Ezel, 6 → Zatlap). Big Ass scope: 2 flips (Dorstlap → Zatlap, both casual direct address). Cross-character: 10 flips. Note: E6_World J229 also flagged for 'da' → 'dat' contraction repair (deferred to Sturdy pass).
